scope.summary: Trims every HTTP config string that existing validation treats as surrounding-whitespace-insensitive before exact-match enforcement can consume it.
out_of_scope: Changing validators or adding whitespace tolerance to fields whose protocol grammar is intentionally exact.

entry_points.name: HTTP configuration loader
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b15-config-adoption-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-config: 132 unit, 5 discovery-parity, 1 example-config, and 5 property tests passed, including validated_http_strings_are_trimmed_before_storage for hosts, origins, mTLS fingerprints, operator subjects, and OAuth resource/issuer/server/scope/secret/metadata fields.

limitations: The proof is scoped config-loading coverage; no live OAuth or mTLS request is claimed.
The full workspace quality gate was not run for this source commit.
